HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION. Plaintiff S. L.'s motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories, request for production of documents and request for admissions is moot in light of the ruling as to defendant's motion for a protective order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.

MODIFICATION: That form interrogatories are due March 29, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
